name: memphantom

usage_sections: Installation: ```bash git clone https://github.com/varungor365/memphantom.git cd memphantom pip install -r requirements.txt

arguments.name: -off
arguments.description: **DMA-based Acquisition** - Hardware-level memory access via FireWire/Thunderbolt

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/varungor365/memphantom.git; pip install -r requirements.txt. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sudo python setup.py install`. Further invocations from upstream: `sudo python memphantom.py --dump --pid 1234 --output process.dmp`; `sudo python memphantom.py --dump-all --output /dumps/`. MemPhantom - Advanced Memory Forensics & Anti-Forensics.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [shell_linux] in the Penetration Testing category. Fits when the engagement needs: MemPhantom - Advanced Memory Forensics & Anti-Forensics.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: MemPhantom - Advanced Memory Forensics & Anti-Forensics.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: When you need Penetration Testing, use memphantom because MemPhantom - Advanced Memory Forensics & Anti-Forensics.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo python setup.py install` as documented upstream for memphantom.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo python memphantom.py --dump --pid 1234 --output process.dmp` as documented upstream for memphantom.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo python memphantom.py --dump-all --output /dumps/` as documented upstream for memphantom.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo python memphantom.py --lsass --output creds.txt` as documented upstream for memphantom.
When chaining Penetration Testing tools, pair memphantom with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `memphantom --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
